Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to common questions about our services.

Yes! We service all domestic and foreign makes and models - cars, trucks, and SUVs.

Absolutely. We carry a wide selection of quality used tires at affordable prices, as well as new tires from major brands.

Yes, we are a certified emissions testing station. We can test your vehicle and help with any repairs needed to pass.

We are open Monday through Friday 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM, and Saturday 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM. We are closed on Sundays.

Walk-ins are welcome! You can also call ahead at (770) 925-3106 to let us know you're coming.

We're at 551 Pleasant Hill Rd NW, Suite A-1, Lilburn, GA 30047. Easy to find off Pleasant Hill Rd.
